applicability_notes: Unary eltwise op; defaults beta=1.0, threshold=20.0 match torch defaults. Golden function registered as torch.nn.functional.softplus. Fusable into preceding eltwise chains as a UnaryWithParam activation.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: activation tensor (Mamba delta_t, shape [1, 1, B*L, d_inner]-class activation)
placement_observations.source: model call site: delta_t2 = ttnn.softplus(delta_t1, beta=1.0, threshold=20.0, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) with immediate deallocate of input (Mamba SSM block)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: activation tensor produced by preceding eltwise op, deallocated immediately after use
placement_observations.source: model call site: delta_t1 produced with dtype=configs['dtype']['activations'], consumed by softplus then ttnn.deallocate(delta_t1)
